name: untracked basename-equality: dist/app.js sentinel write cancelled by src/app.js hook write
note: Documents the KNOWN v1 limitation: matching is by basename, so a sentinel write to dist/app.js is considered accounted-for by a hook write to src/app.js. This is a deliberate, tested behavior — labelled here so a future path-aware upgrade is a conscious change, and so the accuracy number reflects the real engine, not an idealized one.

expect.known_limitation: basename-equality v1: same-basename in a different dir is treated as disclosed
